title: Update default WhatsApp outstanding reminder template to Marathi with paragraph breaks

requirements.summary: Update the default WhatsApp outstanding-balance reminder message to use the provided Marathi text as four paragraphs (blank-line separated) with runtime placeholders for customer name and INR-formatted outstanding balance, and ensure the wa.me deep link preserves the paragraph breaks.
acceptanceCriteria: When opening the "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" flow for a customer, the edit dialog’s default message contains the Marathi text split into four paragraphs separated by blank lines.
The second paragraph shows the selected customer’s name.
The last paragraph shows the selected customer’s outstanding balance formatted in INR using the existing currency formatting.
Sending the message generates a WhatsApp deep link that preserves the paragraph breaks in the prefilled text.

file_operations.description:
Update formatOutstandingMessage() to return the required four-paragraph Marathi template separated by blank lines using newline characters (e.g., "नमस्कार

<name>

...

<INR amount>") while keeping the existing en-IN INR currency formatting for the last paragraph; keep WhatsApp link generation using the existing wa.me pattern and ensure encoding preserves the newline breaks.

Ensure the "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" action continues to populate WhatsAppMessageDialog with the updated multi-paragraph default message from formatOutstandingMessage() and uses generateWhatsAppLink() so the wa.me prefilled text preserves blank-line paragraph breaks.
